step1.categoryPromptSell: What are you selling? Pick a category
step1.categoryPromptBuy: What do you need? Pick a category
step1.serviceNamePlaceholder: What service do you offer or need? *
step1.descriptionOffer: Describe the product: variety, grade, specs, packaging. *
step1.descriptionRequirement: Describe what you need: specs, grade, quality, packaging. *
step1.descriptionService: Describe the scope in a few lines. *

step2.roleQuestion: Who are you in this deal? *
step2.chainPlaceholder: How close are you to the deal? *
step2.mandateHint: Upload the mandate with your documents in the next step. It speeds up vetting.
step2.extraTermsPlaceholder: Anything else the desk should know (optional)

step3.mediaRequired: Photos and videos of the product * (at least one photo, up to {max})
step3.documents: Documents (optional: specs, licences, certificates · up to {max})
step3.documentsPrivacy: Documents are visible only to the desk, never to counterparties.
step3.draftRestored: Welcome back, your draft was restored. Photos cannot survive the sign-in trip, so re-attach them here before publishing.

preview.heading: This is how it appears on the board
preview.priceForDeal: Price indication: USD {price} for the deal
preview.privacy: Your name and contact details are never shown. The reference number is assigned after the desk approves the listing.
preview.freeToPublish: Publishing is free: one click to sign in, no password.

check.heading: Listing check · free
check.unavailable: The check is unavailable right now. You can still publish.
check.upgrade: You have used your free checks. Ponte AI gives you unlimited listing checks and your personal AI account manager for <price>$19/month</price>.

progress.uploadFailed: {count, plural, =1 {One file failed to upload.} other {# files failed to upload.}} The listing stands. The desk will ask for anything missing.

success.bodyDraft: Your draft is safe under Your listings on the marketplace page. Submit it for vetting whenever you are ready.
success.bodySent: Your listing is with the desk for vetting. You will be notified by email either way, usually within two business days.

errors.pickCategory: Pick a category first, one tap.
errors.pickSubcategory: Pick the closest match, one more tap.
errors.describeOffer: Describe it in a few lines: variety, grade, specs.
errors.describeRequirement: Describe what you need: specs, grade, quality.
errors.pickRole: One tap: who are you in this deal?
errors.pickChain: One more tap: how close are you to the deal?
errors.photoRequired: At least one photo of the product is required to publish an offer.
errors.mediaType: "{name}": photos (PNG, JPG, WEBP, GIF) or videos (MP4, WEBM, MOV) only.
errors.genericRetry: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.notice: Share only what you are comfortable sharing. Prefer an NCNDA with the desk first? <request>Request it here</request> and list after signing. Nothing goes live until the desk approves it.
